# @atomic route=post:{{NAME}} auth={{AUTH}}

def Post{{NAME_UPPER}}(body: dict) -> tuple:
    """POST /{{NAME}} handler."""
    if not body.get("test"):
        return 400, "Bad Request", {"error": "test field is required"}

    return 201, "Created", {"created": True}
